sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107489" key="u(pere/ruqros" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπερέρυθρος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n107489.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very red,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.6</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg007:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.8</biblScope> </bibl> (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπερρυθρός</foreign> ed. Ald., corr. Hirschberg; but <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὑπέρυθρος</foreign> should perh. be read: <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">subrubra,</tr_> Lat. version).</sense> </entryFree>
